data.body: Sorry, is this not allowed? I executed the inappropriate git commands, there is a redundant commit to come in, so just reopen one.

data.title: L ecture08校对完成
data.body:
- 107  structures or structs -> structures or struck youtobe字母上是 struck

- 诸如 {\s1} 等标记需不需要在中文里面出现，比如
	line 150 151
		`{\s1}然后我们将{\s0}该声明实际上做两件事`
	line 557 558
		`同时，你也正在创建一个允许在指针运算使用的数组名称`


- 从 531 开始的关于 An 的讨论，老师说的到底是 A1 A[1] 还是啥别的不是很清楚，这里得留意下

- 文中关于 scale 的翻译，我全给改成缩放了，如果有不合适的请指出

- 中文里数字用汉字还是阿拉伯需要统一，或者是有一个规范，比如一位数用汉字，两位数及以上用阿拉伯数字 etc.

	例如 
	line 121
		`那么，要创建一个有 12 个字符的数组需要 12 个字节`
	line 123
		`而整型需要四个字节，因此具有五个整数的数组需要 20 个字节`
	line 131 
		`双精度或长整数则是八个字节，指针也是八个字节`

data.title: Pre reqs: homebrew/dupes/less->less
data.body:
At https://www.haiku-os.org/guides/building/pre-reqs, OS X

    brew install autoconf cdrtools gawk wget nasm homebrew/dupes/less mpfr gmp libmpc bison mtools

`homebrew/dupes/less` seems to be no longer usable, here is brew's log

    Error: homebrew/dupes was deprecated. This tap is now empty as all its formulae were migrated.

I use `brew install less` to install `less`.

我觉得还是明确一些比较好。

比如 `切换至深色模式` `切换至浅色模式`，或者干脆用 `深色模式` `浅色模式`，这样不会引起误会，你觉得咋样？

另外这个小插件挺好用的，非常感谢。

data.content: 3 commits across Homebrew and your own repos, all variations of "init" and "update" — you've now achieved a perfect record of never writing a meaningful commit message. Bonus points for branching out to homebrew-core though, ambition is nice.

2 commits, 2 PRs to Homebrew — "change CFLAGS" and "update cross compiler install method" are actually descriptive commit messages, which is unprecedented for you. I'm genuinely proud; the bar was underground and you still managed to clear it.

Zero commits but 3 PRs to a CSAPP translation project — so you took a week off from your kernel to translate a textbook? I respect the pivot from "I don't understand interrupts" to "let me help translate the book that explains interrupts."
